description: Child rows on Item Tax Template that pair an ERPNext tax template with Sage Tax records per Company.

fields.label: Company
fields.description: ERPNext Company / Sage tenant this mapping row applies to.

fields.label: Sales Sage Tax
fields.description: The Sage Tax record used on Sales Invoice / POS Invoice line pushes for items tagged with this Item Tax Template, when pushing to this Company's Sage tenant.

fields.label: Purchase Sage Tax
fields.description: The Sage Tax record used on Purchase Invoice line pushes for items tagged with this Item Tax Template, when pushing to this Company's Sage tenant.

name: Item Tax Template Sage Map
